Document:
# Development Guides
Step-by-step guides for common development tasks in OpenEdge 14.
## Available Guides
- [textlink="Adding New Skills" link="OE14_DEV_Guide_Skills"] — create a new skill tree and progression - [textlink="Adding New Spells" link="OE14_DEV_Guide_Spells"] — define and implement a new spell action - [textlink="Adding New Jobs" link="OE14_DEV_Guide_Jobs"] — create a new job with salary and spawn point - [textlink="Adding New Species" link="OE14_DEV_Guide_Species"] — add a playable species with racial bonuses - [textlink="Database Migrations" link="OE14_DEV_Guide_Migrations"] — add or modify database schema safely - [textlink="Testing & Debugging" link="OE14_DEV_Guide_Testing"] — tips for testing your changes
## Before You Start
Make sure you understand the core architecture: - [textlink="Entity-Component-System" link="OE14_DEV_Arch_ECS"] — how the game is structured - [textlink="IoC Container" link="OE14_DEV_Arch_IoC"] — how systems access each other - [textlink="Event System" link="OE14_DEV_Arch_Events"] — how systems communicate
Read CLAUDE.md in the repository root for project conventions and coding rules.
